Spring Data Core
  1. org.springframework.data.domain
  2. Example

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.domain.Example

Packages that use Example
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.domain
Central domain abstractions especially to be used in combination with the Repository abstraction.
org.springframework.data.repository.query
Support classes to work with query methods.

  • Uses of Example in org.springframework.data.domain

    Methods in org.springframework.data.domain that return Example
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> Example<T>
    Example.of(T probe)
    Create a new Example including all non-null properties by default.
    static <T> Example<T>
    Example.of(T probe, ExampleMatcher matcher)
    Create a new Example using the given ExampleMatcher.

  • Uses of Example in org.springframework.data.repository.query

    Methods in org.springframework.data.repository.query with parameters of type Example
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <S extends T>
    long
    QueryByExampleExecutor.count(Example<S> example)
    Returns the number of instances matching the given Example.
    <S extends T>
    Mono<Long>
    ReactiveQueryByExampleExecutor.count(Example<S> example)
    Returns the number of instances matching the given Example.
    <S extends T>
    boolean
    QueryByExampleExecutor.exists(Example<S> example)
    Checks whether the data store contains elements that match the given Example.
    <S extends T>
    Mono<Boolean>
    ReactiveQueryByExampleExecutor.exists(Example<S> example)
    Checks whether the data store contains elements that match the given Example.
    <S extends T>
    List<S>
    ListQueryByExampleExecutor.findAll(Example<S> example)
    Returns all entities matching the given Example.
    <S extends T>
    List<S>
    ListQueryByExampleExecutor.findAll(Example<S> example, Sort sort)
    Returns all entities matching the given Example applying the given Sort.
    <S extends T>
    Iterable<S>
    QueryByExampleExecutor.findAll(Example<S> example)
    Returns all entities matching the given Example.
    <S extends T>
    Page<S>
    QueryByExampleExecutor.findAll(Example<S> example, Pageable pageable)
    Returns a Page of entities matching the given Example.
    <S extends T>
    Iterable<S>
    QueryByExampleExecutor.findAll(Example<S> example, Sort sort)
    Returns all entities matching the given Example applying the given Sort.
    <S extends T>
    Flux<S>
    ReactiveQueryByExampleExecutor.findAll(Example<S> example)
    Returns all entities matching the given Example.
    <S extends T>
    Flux<S>
    ReactiveQueryByExampleExecutor.findAll(Example<S> example, Sort sort)
    Returns all entities matching the given Example applying the given Sort.
    <S extends T, R extends @Nullable Object>
    R
    QueryByExampleExecutor.findBy(Example<S> example, Function<FluentQuery.FetchableFluentQuery<S>, R> queryFunction)
    Returns entities matching the given Example applying the queryFunction that defines the query and its result type.
    <S extends T, R, P extends Publisher<R>>
    P
    ReactiveQueryByExampleExecutor.findBy(Example<S> example, Function<FluentQuery.ReactiveFluentQuery<S>, P> queryFunction)
    Returns entities matching the given Example applying the queryFunction that defines the query and its result type.
    <S extends T>
    Optional<S>
    QueryByExampleExecutor.findOne(Example<S> example)
    Returns a single entity matching the given Example or Optional.empty() if none was found.
    <S extends T>
    Mono<S>
    ReactiveQueryByExampleExecutor.findOne(Example<S> example)
    Returns a single entity matching the given Example or Mono.empty() if none was found.
